nasb.text: moreover, you have seen their abominations and their idols of wood, stone, silver, and gold, which they had with them);

esv.text: And you have seen their detestable things, their idols of wood and stone, of silver and gold, which were among them.

cnv.text: 你們也見過他們的可憎之物，和他們那裡那些木、石、金、銀的偶像。

ccb.text: 你们也见过他们用木、石、金、银造的可憎神像。
